title: The Wonderful Chance
writer: H.H. Van Loan, Mary Murillo, Melville Hammett
actors: Eugene O'Brien, Tom Blake, Rudolph Valentino
plot: Upon leaving prison, an ex con vows to go straight, but circumstances force him to return to crime. Meanwhile, a gang of crooks kidnaps a visiting British aristocrat, but the ex-con has an incredible likeness to the Englishman, an...
